key_insights.insight: Suppressing vulnerability as a man experiencing mental health issues can exacerbate the situation, making it even harder to seek help.
key_insights.quote: When you're a man you don't get sympathy the way women get sympathy when they go through revenge porn or anything like that it's not looked upon the same.

key_insights.insight: Sometimes, immediate immersion in problem-solving after a crisis is more crucial than processing emotions.
key_insights.quote: It really wasn't about oh let's go and work through my problems it was like let's put some fucking money in the bank here.

key_insights.insight: Medication can play a crucial role in managing mental health conditions like depression, especially when there is a chemical imbalance in the brain.
key_insights.quote: And when I tookthe medication that was when it really dawned on me like oh that wasn't just because of what I'vebeen through or it was a it was yeah post-traumatic stress disorder and all sorts of other shit but itwas also like a chemical imbalance probably in the brain where my serotonin levels were real low

key_insights.insight: A future-oriented mindset, focusing on achieving goals, can provide motivation but true contentment lies in finding peace in the present moment.
key_insights.quote: Happiness is in fact finding peace today irrespective of uncompleted goals.

key_insights.insight: Recognizing and accepting parental flaws is an important step towards personal healing and maturity.
key_insights.quote: You get to a point where you realisethat I'm not going to have the perfect familythat I see in the filmsand I'm going to have to forgive these peoplewho were meant to be my idols and guardiansfor their own flaws.

key_insights.insight: For online creators, selectively sharing aspects of their lives is essential for preserving personal value and preventing overexposure.
key_insights.quote: How much value does something has if you'll just share it with everyone and i do think you got to pick and choose you know what i mean carefully because once you give it there's no taking it back

key_insights.insight: Embracing fitness can enhance mental wellbeing, but be mindful that it can also introduce new pressures.
key_insights.quote: It's great in terms of like making you feel better and you have agreat workout and you get the endorphins and stuff but also weirdly there's the um if i have a bad week i feel worse about it

actionable_advice.advice: Turn off social media comments for mental health.
actionable_advice.how_to: Disable comments on your profiles and specific posts to shield yourself from negativity and focus on your own content creation.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize present moment peace over future achievements.
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively seek out activities and relationships that bring you a sense of calm and contentment in your day-to-day life, rather than solely focusing on future goals.

actionable_advice.advice: Master insecurity instead of letting it consume you.
actionable_advice.how_to: Acknowledge and understand your insecurities, then learn to channel them into fuel for creativity, productivity, and drive while preventing them from overwhelming your mental state.

memorable_stories: The story of the teacher predicting True Geordie would end up in prison.
True Geordie's experience of reckless spending on luxury cars and the subsequent financial and emotional crash.
True Geordie's account of phoning the ambulance for his dad's suicide attempt and dealing with the situation.
contrarian_claims: Comments aren't necessarily needed for engagement. You can still engage with your audience without comments on your social media accounts.
Turning off social media comments could actually help you because it takes off some stress off your shoulders.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Rise, The Fall & The Rebuild Of True Geordie
